failure_movement.justification: No prev-iter cluster baseline (iter 0 = null), so direction cannot be verified. Actual: correct=38, empty=25, unknown=33, wrong=4. Prediction correctly anticipated unknown as dominant failure mode and passrate landing in [0.26,0.41] (actual 0.38), but the 30-50% shrink claim is unverifiable without a prior cluster delta.

trace_movement.justification: Predicted prompt tokens 1500-2500; actual avg=1637.5 (confirmed, low end of range). Quoted-context snippets appear in many passing predictions (confirmed). But predicted 8-12 hits visible; actual avg=18.6 (14-20 range), contradicted. No prior token baseline to confirm the +300 token growth claim.

side_effects.justification: Token consumption stayed well within context limits (avg 1637 prompt tokens, max 1824): confirmed. Judge extraction stable (passrate measurable, FINAL ANSWER guard held): confirmed. Verbose-answer risk: mild evidence. No regressions flagged that clearly occurred. Correct risk framing, mostly confirmed.
